playbooks.title: Create — reduce tick stress
playbooks.summary: Large contraptions: prefer chunkloading discipline and avoid excessive mechanical networks in one chunk.

playbooks.title: JEI — client memory
playbooks.summary: Huge mod lists inflate JEI index; pair with reasonable `-Xmx` and avoid duplicate JEI addons.

playbooks.title: KubeJS — edit safely
playbooks.summary: Keep scripts under `kubejs/`; use Forager's backup writer before large refactors.

playbooks.title: Forge — read the right log
playbooks.summary: Use `latest.log` first; `debug.log` only when asked for verbose loader traces.
